objective: Make the current Locaily build internally trustworthy after PR #19 merge: verify behavior, repair confirmed defects, restore validation, reconcile docs.

defect_fixes.fix: Operator console checks confirmResult.confirmed before job mutations
Operator enqueue sends executionType; fake servers aligned; production route test added
Background worker evaluates execution outcome via companion/jobs/job-outcome.js
Server Development Memory endpoints resolve active-project paths via memory-services.js

validation: npm run test:full — canonical offline non-hardware suite
npm run test:jobs:production — real /jobs route with running server

results: Four defects independently verified and fixed with regression coverage
not_run: Clean-machine acceptance on fresh VM (manual packaging gate)

next_milestone: Development Memory end-to-end proof using a second real project
